my_thoughts: With method accepted, shift back to substance. Keep PR moderate; remind them contradictions are diagnostic, not hostile, if they complain again.
accumulated_insight: Two-turn pattern: T1 accusation of twisting ? T2 acceptance of method frame. They understand: contradictions come from their own statements; Socratic method reveals them. Recursion_loop/ME_03 has reframed the process as help rather than trap.
visible_response: Either refute philosophy, or else, by the Dog, Callicles will not agree with Callicles, but will be out of harmony with himself all his life long.
